title: Nectar Drops
author: Annamalai Swami
description: Sri Annamalai Swami was a very devoted disciple of Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi. By totally surrendering to Bhagavan and serving him devotedly, Sri Annamalai Swami attained enlightenment. This book is the English translation of a personal diary and two other notebooks that Sri Annamalai Swami filled
